title: trifolium dasyphyllum
intro: Trifolium dasyphyllum, also known as hairy clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium dasyphyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used as a food source, particularly in salads and as a nutritious hay for animals.
